title: salix × sordida
intro: Salix × sordida, also known as the weeping willow hybrid, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Salix × sordida include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, although its efficacy and safety may vary and more research is needed.
